data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Safeguards the platform against distributed denial of service attacks.
data.technical_spec: Uses network layer defenses and rate limiting to mitigate DDoS threats.

data.title: TLS Encryption
data.description: Encrypts data in transit between users and the YouTube servers.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes TLS 1.3 for secure communication channels and enhanced privacy.

data.title: User Authentication
data.description: Protects user accounts from unauthorized access.
data.technical_spec: Implements OAuth 2.0, two-factor authentication (2FA), and reCAPTCHA.

data.title: Security Patching
data.description: Regular security updates prevent vulnerabilities in the system.
data.technical_spec: Automated patch management tools are used for timely updates and vulnerability management.

data.title: Content Monitoring
data.description: Automated systems and algorithms monitor content for policy violations.
data.technical_spec: Artificial Intelligence and machine learning are employed to identify and flag inappropriate content.
